name: karta
description: karta — a stack-agnostic orchestration framework: plan a binder → deliver it in parallel waves → build each item, gated by verify/validate.

metadata.description: Stack-agnostic orchestration skills + four agents — two read-only gates (karta-acceptance-reviewer, karta-safety-auditor) and two opt-in writers (karta-doc-gardner for docs, karta-kaizen for stack packs): synthesize a binder of work items, deliver it in parallel waves onto a per-binder integration branch, build each item in an isolated worktree, and gate it on behavioral or visual acceptance. Deep frontend support preserved.

plugins.name: karta
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic orchestration framework. Synthesize a binder of work items (karta-plan), deliver it in parallel waves onto a per-binder integration branch (karta-deliver), build each item in an isolated git worktree (karta-build), and gate it on behavioral (karta-verify) or visual (karta-validate) acceptance — no PR, ends at the integration branch. Stack-agnostic across frontend, backend, CLI, data, and IaC, while keeping deep frontend support (component/token mapping, DTCG, design validation). Ships four agents: two read-only gates (karta-acceptance-reviewer, karta-safety-auditor) and two opt-in writers that edit only what you enable (karta-doc-gardner for docs, karta-kaizen for stack packs).
